allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Count:', p.length\); if\(p[0]\) console.log\('First keys:', Object.keys\(p[0]\).join\(', '\)\); if\(p[0]\) console.log\('Has slug:', !!p[0].slug, 'Has sun:', Array.isArray\(p[0].sun\)\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([p.get\('_id'\) or p.get\('id'\) for p in data[:3]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; text=sys.stdin.read\(\); data=json.loads\(text\); print\([p.get\('_id'\) or p.get\('id'\) for p in data[:3]]\)")
Bash(node -e "try { const p = require\('mapbox-gl/package.json'\); console.log\(p.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not installed'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./data/plants.json'\); const types = {}; p.forEach\(x => { types[x.plantType] = \(types[x.plantType]||0\)+1 }\); console.log\('Total:', p.length\); console.log\(types\); const suns = {}; p.forEach\(x => x.sun.forEach\(s => { suns[s] = \(suns[s]||0\)+1 }\)\); console.log\('Sun tolerances:', suns\); const suppliers = new Set\(\); p.forEach\(x => \(x.suppliers||[]\).forEach\(s => suppliers.add\(s.supplierSlug\)\)\); console.log\('Suppliers referenced:', [...suppliers]\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./data/plants.json'\); const slugs = p.map\(x => x.slug\); console.log\(slugs.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const old = require\('./data/plants.json'\); const newP = require\('./data/new-plants.json'\); const merged = [...old, ...newP]; require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('./data/plants.json', JSON.stringify\(merged, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total:', merged.length\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/plants.json'\); console.log\('Total:', d.length\); console.log\('Last 3:', d.slice\(-3\).map\(p => p.commonName\)\)")

Bash(git -c user.name="Nick" -c user.email="nick@Nicks-MacBook-Pro.local" add package.json package-lock.json src/app/plan/new/page.tsx src/components/map/MapboxMap.tsx src/lib/analysis/sun-grid.ts src/types/plan.ts)

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./data/plants.json'\); console.log\('Count:', p.length\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(p[0]\)\); console.log\('Sample types:', [...new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.type\)\)]\); console.log\('Sample habitats:', [...new Set\(p.flatMap\(x=>x.habitats||[]\)\)]\);")
